name: Duke Energy CORP
summary: Duke Energy is an energy company headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina, incorporated in 2005. It operates two primary segments: Electric Utilities and Infrastructure (EU&I) and Gas Utilities and Infrastructure (GU&I). EU&I provides retail electric service via generation, transmission, distribution, and sale of electricity to approximately 8.7 million customers across six states in the Southeast and Midwest U.S., covering roughly 90,000 square miles. The company relies on natural gas, nuclear, coal, hydroelectric, and solar sources for generation.

products.name: Retail Electric Service
products.description: Generation, transmission, distribution, and sale of electricity to approximately 8.7 million retail customers in six states.

products.name: Wholesale Electric Service
products.description: Electricity sold wholesale to municipalities, electric cooperative utilities, and other load-serving entities.

products.name: Gas Utilities and Infrastructure
products.description: Natural gas distribution and infrastructure services provided through the GU&I segment, including Piedmont.

products.name: Nuclear Power Generation
products.description: Electricity generation from nuclear facilities, supplying 27.5% of EU&I net generation in 2025.

partnerships.description: Investment agreement for $6 billion in exchange for an anticipated 19.7% indirect investment in Duke Energy Florida, announced August 2025.
Piedmont, a subsidiary registrant, supplies natural gas for EU&I generation fleet under standard industry agreements.
